svg.aria-label: OpenAI Stateful Runtime memory persistence and attack surface, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore multi-agent orchestration access controls, Google continuous evaluation framework for AI agent trust boundaries.
svg.title: 2026-02-28: AI agent stateful runtime security, AgentCore, continuous eval

g.text: Expire stale memories : isolate user sessions : encrypt...
Separate IAM role per agent : short-lived tokens :...
Red-team eval pipeline : safety threshold alerts :...
Automated red-team prompts : safety gate in CI/CD : log...
